prompt: World truths time. I want to give completely custom answers — no preset options. Just ask me about each truth and I'll tell you what I want.

assertions.description: GM presents each truth as an open question, not an A/B/C list
All 11 truth categories are addressed in order
upsert_lore is called immediately after each truth is locked, not batched
Each truth ends with bold Locked. followed by one crisp sentence
Later truths build on earlier ones (Iron→Firstborn identity; Legacies→Communities layout; Darkness→Prior Settlers connection)
All 11 custom answers form a coherent, internally consistent world
assertions.notes: Fungal network unifies Iron, Mysticism, Religion, Firstborn, Beasts, and Darkness into a single throughline. Exile shapes leadership and defense culture. Prior Settlers connect Legacies, Communities, and Darkness.

assertions.description: Referenced entities created and wired after all 11 truths
GM reads back all 11 locked sentences as a single paragraph and asks if anything feels wrong
Session ends with 'Where does [character] fit in? What vow starts us moving?'
